_meta.method: Web search of Mokusho Zen House Romania directory and Plum Village resources
knownGaps: Plum Village Romania lay sanghas — possibly active but not on plumline.org with stable URL
Smaller AZI-affiliated groups in Cluj or Iași not consistently listed

places.name: Mokushozen-ji (Mokusho Zen House București)
places.notes: First Eastern European Zen dojo (1993), founded by Monk Myoken. Named 'Temple of Silent Illumination Zen.' Daily zazen, eight sessions per week.

places.name: Mokusho Zen Dojo Brașov
places.address: Aleea Lăcrămioarelor 7A, Bl. 8, Sc. D, Ap. 22
places.notes: Branch of Mokusho Zen House Romania. Morning and evening zazen sessions weekly.
